# Shari’s Shari Problem & LVMH Intrigue

Stewart’s Apple Confessional, Trump’s Doug Bug, Malone’s F1 Fantasy
 ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

| |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | |  | | --- | | [View email in browser](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dRR0I4amM1clNkdk01X3VaVzJxTT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | [The Daily Courant](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dRR0I4amM1clNkdk01X3VaVzJxTT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | |  | | --- | | **Stewart’s Apple Confessional, Trump’s Doug Bug, Malone’s F1 Fantasy** | | Happy Friday and welcome back to The Daily Courant, your afternoon package of Puck’s best new reporting.     First up today, **Matthew Belloni** brilliantly dissects the fallout for Paramount Global now that the **Ellison** /RedBird bid has been put to bed. Is there another bidder hanging around the hoop? And more importantly, has **Shari Redstone** lost her credibility?     Plus, below the fold: **Lauren Sherman** scoops a micro-drama surrounding LVMH’s wunderkind designer. **Tara Palmeri** spotlights Mar-a-Lago’s sudden **Doug Burgum** fixation. **John Ourand** digs into **John Malone** ’s next F1 fantasy. On *The Town* , Matt and legendary host **Jon Stewart** discuss his split with Apple and return to *The Daily Show* . On *Fashion People* , Lauren and **Fabiola Beracasa Beckman** revel in **Lagerfeld** stories before debriefing her segue into filmmaking. And on *The Powers That Be* , **Julia Ioffe** joins **Peter Hamby** to scrutinize the Kremlin’s ’24 vote and the debates percolating through Foggy Bottom. | |  | | [Shari Redstone Hasn’t Solved Her Biggest Problem: Shari Redstone](https://email.puck.) | | MATTHEW BELLONI | | By putting Paramount up for sale, negotiating publicly for six months, and nuking a fully negotiated deal at the goal line, Shari has likely set the company on a downward spiral of chaos and uncertainty—one her father might have foreseen. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Loewe & Behold](https://email.puck.) | | LAUREN SHERMAN | | Why is Jonathan Anderson, the wunderkind behind Loewe’s resurgence, meeting with Fast Retailing? And what could really be next for LVMH’s most valuable talent? | |  | | [The Doug Bug](https://email.puck.) | | TARA PALMERI | | As the veepstakes beckon, Trump seems curiously taken by Doug Burgum—the ultra-conservative plains centimillionaire with the attractive wife and Pence-like deference. Is this his Cary Grant? | |  | | [Malone’s New F1 Fantasy](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dRR0I4amM1clNkdk01X3VaVzJxTT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbWFsb25lcy1uZXctZjEtZmFudGFzeS8_) | | JOHN OURAND | | The ageless mogul’s decision to take a controlling position in Formula E suggests that he’s looking to re-create the magic he found in its sister racing sport. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Jon Stewart Talks Apple Split, Corporate Constraints, and Media’s Regression](https://email.puck.) | | MATTHEW BELLONI | | Matt is joined by Jon Stewart to discuss his return to ‘The Daily Show,’ why he and Apple were not a great fit, and how the media, political, and comedy landscape has changed in the nine years since he left ‘The Daily Show.’ | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [The DVF Treatment](https://email.puck.) | | LAUREN SHERMAN | | Fabiola Beracasa Beckman joins Lauren to chat about her earliest years in fashion, Lagerfeld stories, fitting stories, couture secrets, her segue into filmmaking, and the long run-up to her new doc, Diane von Furstenberg: Woman in Charge. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Putin’s ’24 Pick](https://email.puck.) | | PETER HAMBY & JULIA IOFFE | | Julia Ioffe joins Peter Hamby to reveal whether the Kremlin is pulling for Biden or Trump in November. Sure, the answer might seem obvious—but as Julia explains, the reality is far more complicated, and has become the subject of fiery debate in both Moscow and Foggy Bottom. | | | |  | | --- | | [Puck](https://email.puck.) | | |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Facebook](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dRR0I4amM1clNkdk01X3VaVzJxTT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vcHVja2RvdG5ld3M_) | [Twitter](https://email.puck.) | [Instagram](https://email.puck.) | [LinkedIn](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | | Need help?
